title: Resolve, Directing the Department of Education to Collect Data on Cursive Instruction in Maine Public Schools
last_house_action: 5/20/2025 - FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
last_senate_action: 4/29/2026 - Died in Possession of the Senate when the Legislature adjourned Sine Die and was PLACED IN THE LEGISLATIVE FILES . (DEAD)

actions.description: Received by the Clerk of the House on January 6, 2025. The Bill was REFERRED to the Committee on EDUCATION AND CULTURAL AFFAIRS pursuant to Joint Rule 308.2 and ordered printed pursuant to Joint Rule 401.
Carried over, in the same posture, to the next special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 519.

CONSENT CALENDAR - FIRST DAY Under suspension of the rules CONSENT CALENDAR - SECOND DAY. The Bill was PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED as Amended by Committee Amendment "A" (H-113) . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.

Report READ and ACCEPTED , in concurrence. READ ONCE . Committee Amendment "A" (H-113) READ and ADOPTED , in concurrence. Under suspension of the Rules, READ A SECOND TIME and PASSED TO BE ENGROSSED AS AMENDED BY Committee Amendment "A" (H-113), in concurrence. Ordered sent down forthwith.
FINALLY PASSED . Sent for concurrence. ORDERED SENT FORTHWITH.
On motion by Senator ROTUNDO of Androscoggin PLACED ON THE SPECIAL APPROPRIATIONS TABLE pending FINAL PASSAGE in concurrence
CARRIED OVER , in the same posture, to any special or regular session of the 132nd Legislature, pursuant to Joint Order SP 800.
Died in Possession of the Senate when the Legislature adjourned Sine Die and was PLACED IN THE LEGISLATIVE FILES . (DEAD)

amendments.label: C "A" (H-113 )
amendments.new_title: Resolve, Directing the Department of Education to Collect Data on Cursive Instruction in Maine Public Schools
